title: Derivatives changes feed
description: GET /derivatives/changes?since=<unix_seconds> — the poll-based delta feed (capability `changes`). A JSON ARRAY of every derivative row with updated_at > since, ascending by (updated_at, inode, kind). OpenLoupe polls this on its bounded refresh cadence (NOT SSE), keys its badge cache by (inode,kind) so re-delivery is idempotent, and swaps a farm derivative onto an on-screen asset when it appears. A strict `>` excludes same-second rows (poll since-1 for at-least-once). Missing/garbage `since` ⇒ full history. SSE is the browser web UI's path, not this.

inode.description: The asset inode (the key everything else is fetched by).

hash.description: The row's source_hash (xxh3); null if unset.

updated_at.description: Unix seconds — the cursor the consumer advances `since` to.
